description: Context and automation MCP server for Warm financial data and approved write operations.
name: io.github.jasonstockman/warmio

environmentVariables.description: Optional context API key. The local context key file is used when omitted.
environmentVariables.name: WARM_CONTEXT_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional path to the context API key file.
environmentVariables.name: WARM_CONTEXT_API_KEY_FILE

environmentVariables.description: Optional automation API key. The local automation key file is used when omitted.
environmentVariables.name: WARM_AUTOMATION_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Optional path to the automation API key file.
environmentVariables.name: WARM_AUTOMATION_API_KEY_FILE

environmentVariables.description: Optional path to the Warm configuration directory.
environmentVariables.name: WARM_CONFIG_DIR

environmentVariables.description: Optional Warm API base URL override. Defaults to https://app.warm.io.
environmentVariables.name: WARM_API_URL

environmentVariables.description: Optional request timeout override in milliseconds.
environmentVariables.name: WARM_API_TIMEOUT_MS

packageArguments.description: Select the three-tool context or automation surface.

title: Warm
